word: H1541 - גְּלָה - gᵉlâh - ghel-aw' - Bring over

sections.paragraph:
Original: גּלא גּלה

Transliteration: gelâh gelâ'

Phonetic: ghel-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to reveal
    1. (Peal) to reveal (secrets), be revealed
    2. (Aphel) to take into exile

Origin: corresponding to H1540

TWOT entry: 2656

Part(s) of speech: Verb
